title: Hegseth: Navy will 'shoot to destroy' any ship laying mines; calls Iran navy 'gang of pirates with a flag'
snippet: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth at Pentagon press conference upgrades language from Trump's 'shoot and kill' to 'shoot to destroy' for any vessel laying mines in Hormuz. Calls Iran's navy a 'gang of pirates with a flag.' Joint briefing with Gen. Caine. Says blockade will continue 'as long as it takes.' Demonstrates expanded ROE for US Navy forces.
tag_reason: New Pentagon press conference with escalated language — 'shoot to destroy' is stronger than Trump's 'shoot and kill'. 'Pirates with a flag' is inflammatory new rhetoric from DefSec.
